en: Long ago I was at home.
The book lies on the left.
The book lies on the right.
He works for a long time.
Today we went to the cinema.
Yesterday we went to the cinema.
Long ago we went to the cinema.
Recently we went to the cinema.
The car is parked at home.
The car is parked on the left.
The car is parked on the right.
Here it is a little quiet.
We always work as a pair.
We always work for a long time.
They finished the task with difficulty.
